arts.ttl: Newcastle issue Harvey Barnes statement after being told he was transfer listed
arts.sum: Newcastle boss Eddie Howe has praised Magpies star Harvey Barnes and made it clear the former Leicester City ace is a key part of his plans moving forward at St James' Park

arts.ttl: How to watch Newcastle United vs Bromley - TV channel, BBC iPlayer live stream
arts.sum: Let's have none of that at St James' Park today as Newcastle United take on League Two Bromley. United have had more that their fair share of cup shocks, and while Howe is expected to make plenty changes today, he will not be taking anything for granted.

arts.ttl: Man City's 115 charges verdict hint with relegation clause transfer policy as Newcastle foiled
arts.sum: It has emerged that City are not supporting their business by offering relegation escape clauses as a safety measure during their ongoing legal fight with the Premier League. Manchester City have dropped another major hint over their 115 charges with their January window activity as a £150million attack on the transfer market continues.

arts.ttl: Newcastle vs Bromley – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Newcastle United welcome Bromley to St James’ Park today in one of the most intriguing FA Cup third-round ties of the weekend. Bromley are in their first-ever season in the Football League after promotion to League Two last season. The Ravens have made a solid start in the EFL and currently reside in 12th place, […] The post Newcastle vs Bromley – Predicted lineup and team news first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United release Harvey Barnes statement after £38m man told he was transfer listed
arts.sum: Howe, who could pick Barnes to play against Bromley from the start, wanted to address unsettling talk on the winger's future and said: "Harvey's been really unfortunate this year because he has played very well when he has been given the opportunity so I've got no issue with Harvey's performances – and that's quite rare when a player's not playing, that I can say he's performed really well. The problem that I've had is fitting Harvey and Anthony Gordon into the same team, two outstanding players who play the same position.

arts.ttl: Alexander Isak deal done, Kylian Mbappe signs – Liverpool's dream transfers under Elon Musk
arts.sum: News of Elon Musk's interest in a Liverpool takeover has sparked speculation of what transfers could be possible under the ownership of the SpaceX founder - and the sky is the limit

arts.ttl: How to watch Newcastle United v Bromley on TV today - live stream details
arts.sum: This is Bromley's first-ever FA Cup third-round tie

arts.ttl: Newcastle United drop two early team news hints for Bromley as Eddie Howe faces FA Cup decision
arts.sum: With the hectic fixture schedule and playing a lower league opposition, the game could give Howe the chance to rotate his team, and give players who may have struggled for game time this season more minutes. In the last three Premier League games he has played just four minutes, although he did come on for the final 25 minutes of the Carabao Cup win over Arsenal.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United star Martin Dubravka breaks silence as Saudi transfer deadline set
arts.sum: But as Chronicle Live reported on Friday, Howe said even if Dubravka stayed and played a couple more times this season that would be deemed the "right decision" from a football point of view - especially if he helps Newcastle book their place in the Carabao Cup final should Nick Pope's injury issues continue. As Chronicle Live reported on Saturday, Dubravka had been given an ultimatum from Saudi Pro League club Al-Shabab after they set a weekend deadline for him to make up his mind on a January move.

arts.ttl: Newcastle vs Bromley Prediction: Team News, Predicted Lineups and Where To Watch
arts.sum: Newcastle host League Two side Bromley in the FA Cup this afternoon. Ahead of the clash, we’ve made a prediction for the game, provided our predicted line-ups for both teams, and picked out a B...
